2603.28561.title: Fine-Tuning Large Language Models for Cooperative Tactical Deconfliction of Small Unmanned Aerial Systems
2603.28561.paper_summary: The growing deployment of small Unmanned Aerial Systems (sUASs) in low-altitude airspaces has increased the need for reliable tactical deconfliction under safety-critical constraints. Tactical deconfliction involves short-horizon decision-making in dense, partially observable, and heterogeneous multi-agent environments, where both cooperative separation assurance and operational efficiency must be maintained. While Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong reasoning capabilities, their direct application to air traffic control remains limited by insufficient domain grounding and unpredictable output inconsistency. This paper investigates LLMs as decision-makers in cooperative multi-agent tactical deconfliction using fine-tuning strategies that align model outputs to human operator heuristics. We propose a simulation-to-language data generation pipeline based on the BlueSky air traffic simulator that produces rule-consistent deconfliction datasets reflecting established safety practices. A pretrained Qwen-Math-7B model is fine-tuned using two parameter-efficient strategies: supervised fine-tuning with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and preference-based fine-tuning combining LoRA with Group-Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Experimental results on validation datasets and closed-loop simulations demonstrate that supervised LoRA fine-tuning substantially improves decision accuracy, consistency, and separation performance compared to the pretrained LLM, with significant reductions in near mid-air collisions. GRPO provides additional coordination benefits but exhibits reduced robustness when interacting with heterogeneous agent policies.
2603.28561.paper_summary_zh: 小型無人機系統（sUASs）在低空空域的日益部署增加了在安全關鍵限制下可靠的戰術去衝突需求。戰術去衝突涉及在密集、部分可觀察和異質的多代理環境中進行短期決策，在這種環境中，必須維持合作的分離保證和操作效率。儘管大型語言模型（LLMs）展現出強大的推理能力，但其在空中交通控制中的直接應用仍受到領域基礎不足和不可預測的輸出不一致性的限制。本文探討了LLMs作為合作多代理戰術去衝突中的決策者，使用微調策略使模型輸出與人類操作員的啟發式相一致。我們提出了一個基於BlueSky空中交通模擬器的模擬到語言數據生成管道，該管道生成反映既定安全實踐的規則一致的去衝突數據集。一個預訓練的Qwen-Math-7B模型使用兩種參數高效的策略進行微調：使用低秩適應（LoRA）的監督微調和結合LoRA與群體相對政策優化（GRPO）的基於偏好的微調。在驗證數據集和閉環模擬上的實驗結果表明，監督LoRA微調顯著提高了決策準確性、一致性和分離性能，相較於預訓練的LLM，並顯著減少了近乎空中碰撞的事件。GRPO提供了額外的協調效益，但在與異質代理政策互動時顯示出較低的穩健性。
2603.28561.author: Iman Sharifi et.al.
2603.28561.authors: Iman Sharifi, Alex Zongo, Peng Wei
